name: Blueberry Cheesecake Macadamia
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 ounces Macadamias, crushed in a blender
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crust ingredients. Mix well and press onto the bottom of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at preheated 400°F for 10-15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F.
3. Crumble the cream cheese in a large bowl. Add 1 teaspoon vanilla, 1 cup sugar, and eggs; beat until blended and smooth (about 4 minutes).
4. Pour over the crust and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes until set but not completely firm. Let cool for 10 minutes.
5. Combine sour cream, sugar, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla in a separate bowl. Spread over the cheesecake.
6. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes. Cool, then spread the blueberry topping over the top.
7. Mix cornstarch with cold water to form a smooth paste. Stir in the blueberries; cook until thickened. Let cool and spread on the cheesecake.
8. Allow to cool completely before refrigerating.
